Form: Annexure 1b - First Examination of Newborn
Question/Item: Is the baby alive? (Yes/No) If not note Date time and place of Death
Action/Notes: In case of still birth/newborn death do not perform further examination of baby but complete examination of mother as per home visit form on day 1 3 7 14 21 28 42. Cause of death to be reported to ANM/MPW/PHC for infant death review

Form: Annexure 1b - First Examination of Newborn
Question/Item: Is the baby preterm? (if yes write the preterm cut off date)

Form: Annexure 1b - First Examination of Newborn
Question/Item: Date of First examination (Time: Early morning/Morning/Afternoon/Evening/Night)
Action/Notes: Days: Hrs: After birth

Form: Annexure 1b - First Examination of Newborn
Question/Item: Is the Mother alive? (Yes/No) If not note the Date time and place of Death
Action/Notes: In case Mother is dead do not perform further examination of mother but complete examination of the baby as per home visit form on day 1 3 7 14 21 28 42. Report to ANM/PHC for maternal death review

Form: Annexure 1b - First Examination of Newborn
Question/Item: Does the mother have Excessive Bleeding? (Yes/No)
Action/Notes: If yes refer immediately to a hospital. Action taken (Yes/No)

Form: Annexure 1b - First Examination of Newborn
Question/Item: Does the mother have Unconscious/Fits? (Yes/No)
Action/Notes: If yes refer immediately to a hospital. Action taken (Yes/No)

Form: Annexure 1b - First Examination of Newborn
Question/Item: What was given as the first feed to baby after birth?

Form: Annexure 1b - First Examination of Newborn
Question/Item: At what time was the baby first breastfed? (Hrs Min)

Form: Annexure 1b - First Examination of Newborn
Question/Item: How did the baby take feed? - Forcefully (Yes/No)

Form: Annexure 1b - First Examination of Newborn
Question/Item: How did the baby take feed? - Weakly (Yes/No)

Form: Annexure 1b - First Examination of Newborn
Question/Item: How did the baby take feed? - Could not breastfeed but had to be fed with spoon (Yes/No)

Form: Annexure 1b - First Examination of Newborn
Question/Item: How did the baby take feed? - Could neither breast-feed nor could take milk given by spoon (Yes/No)

Form: Annexure 1b - First Examination of Newborn
Question/Item: Does the mother have breastfeeding problem? (Yes/No)
Action/Notes: Write the problem; if there is any problem in breast feeding help the mother to overcome it

Form: Annexure 1b - First Examination of Newborn
Question/Item: Temperature of the baby (Measure in axilla and record)

Form: Annexure 1b - First Examination of Newborn
Question/Item: Eyes: Normal / Swelling or oozing pus

Form: Annexure 1b - First Examination of Newborn
Question/Item: Is umbilical cord bleeding? (Yes/No)
Action/Notes: If yes either ASHA ANM/MPW or TBA can tie again with a clean thread. Action taken (Yes/No)

Form: Annexure 1b - First Examination of Newborn
Question/Item: Weight: Kg Gm - Weighing matches with the colour?
Action/Notes: Colour on scale: Red/Yellow/Green

Form: Annexure 1b - First Examination of Newborn
Question/Item: All limbs limp (Yes/No)

Form: Annexure 1b - First Examination of Newborn
Question/Item: Feeding less/stop (Yes/No)

Form: Annexure 1b - First Examination of Newborn
Question/Item: Cry weak stopped (Yes/No)

Form: Annexure 1b - First Examination of Newborn
Question/Item: Routine Newborn Care: Dry the baby (Yes/No)

Form: Annexure 1b - First Examination of Newborn
Question/Item: Routine Newborn Care: Keep warm do not bathe wrap in cloth keep closer to mother (Yes/No)

Form: Annexure 1b - First Examination of Newborn
Question/Item: Routine Newborn Care: Initiate exclusive breast feeding (Yes/No)

Form: Annexure 1b - First Examination of Newborn
Question/Item: Routine Newborn Care: Keep the cord clean and dry (Yes/No)

Form: Annexure 1b - First Examination of Newborn
Question/Item: Anything unusual in baby? (curved limbs/cleft lip/other)

Form: Annexure 1c - Home Visit Form (Mother and Newborn)
Question/Item: Is the baby alive? (Yes/No) If not note Date time and place of Death. In case of Newborn death do not perform further examination of baby but complete examination of mother.

Form: Annexure 1c - Home Visit Form (Mother and Newborn)
Question/Item: No. of times mother takes a full meal in 24 hrs
Action/Notes: If less than 4 times or if meals not full advise mother to do so.

Form: Annexure 1c - Home Visit Form (Mother and Newborn)
Question/Item: Bleeding: how many pads are changed in a day
Action/Notes: If more than 5 pads refer the mother to a hospital.

Form: Annexure 1c - Home Visit Form (Mother and Newborn)
Question/Item: Is the baby being kept warm (near mother clothed and wrapped properly)? (Yes/No)
Action/Notes: Advise the mother to do so if not being done.

Form: Annexure 1c - Home Visit Form (Mother and Newborn)
Question/Item: Is the baby being fed properly (whenever hungry or at least 7-8 times in 24 hrs)? (Yes/No)
Action/Notes: Advise the mother to do so if not being done.

Form: Annexure 1c - Home Visit Form (Mother and Newborn)
Question/Item: Is the baby crying incessantly or passing urine less than 6 times a day? (Yes/No)
Action/Notes: Advise mother to feed the baby after every 2 hours.

Form: Annexure 1c - Home Visit Form (Mother and Newborn)
Question/Item: Temperature: Measure and record
Action/Notes: Temperature up to 102 degree F (38.9 degree C) - treat with paracetamol; if above refer to hospital

Form: Annexure 1c - Home Visit Form (Mother and Newborn)
Question/Item: Foul smelling discharge and fever more than 100 degree F (37.8 degree C)? (Yes/No)
Action/Notes: If yes refer the mother to a hospital

Form: Annexure 1c - Home Visit Form (Mother and Newborn)
Question/Item: Is mother speaking abnormally or having fits? (Yes/No)
Action/Notes: If yes refer the mother to a hospital

Form: Annexure 1c - Home Visit Form (Mother and Newborn)
Question/Item: Mother has no milk since delivery or if perceives breast milk to be less? (Yes/No)
Action/Notes: Ask the mother to feed the baby more often and counsel her for proper attachment and positioning during breast feeding.

Form: Annexure 1c - Home Visit Form (Mother and Newborn)
Question/Item: Cracked nipples/painful and/or engorged breast? (Yes/No)
Action/Notes: In case of cracked nipples advise the mother to keep the breast clean and lubricated. If nipples are red/shiny/flaky/itchy etc and condition persists refer to hospital. In case of engorged breasts advise mother to feed baby frequently; if not possible teach mother to express milk. If breasts are hard warm compression and gentle massage towards nipples can help. If mother has fever refer to hospital.

Form: Annexure 1c - Home Visit Form (Mother and Newborn)
Question/Item: Are the eyes swollen or with pus? (Yes/No)
Action/Notes: If there is pus in the eye then antibiotic ointment can be applied.

Form: Annexure 1c - Home Visit Form (Mother and Newborn)
Question/Item: Weight
Action/Notes: If weight < 2.5kg advise extra warmth and more frequent feeding. If weight < 1.8kg refer to SNCU at nearest health facility and conduct extra home visits as per high risk baby form. If baby (LBW or normal) not gaining weight refer to SNCU.

Form: Annexure 1c - Home Visit Form (Mother and Newborn)
Question/Item: Temperature: measure & record
Action/Notes: If < 97°F advise warmth (increase room temp skin-to-skin warm bag frequent feeding). If < 95.9°F give above advice and once warmer clothe and place in pre-warmed bed. If > 99°F look for signs of sepsis; manage with 1/4 spoon paracetamol and refer to SNCU immediately.

Form: Annexure 1c - Home Visit Form (Mother and Newborn)
Question/Item: Yellowness in eyes or skin: jaundice? (Yes/No)
Action/Notes: If jaundice since first day or persists after 14 days of birth refer to NBSU and/or SNCU at nearest health facility

Form: Annexure 1c - Home Visit Form (Mother and Newborn)
Question/Item: Has the baby received BCG? (Yes/No)

Form: Annexure 1c - Home Visit Form (Mother and Newborn)
Question/Item: Has the baby received OPV? (Yes/No)
Action/Notes: *If not then needs to be given within the first 8 hours

Form: Annexure 1c - Home Visit Form (Mother and Newborn)
Question/Item: Has the baby received Hep B (0)? (Yes/No)

Form: Annexure 1c - Home Visit Form (Mother and Newborn)
Question/Item: Has the baby received Penta-1 PCV and Rota-1 vaccinations? Write age of baby when done (in days)

Form: Annexure 1c - Home Visit Form (Mother and Newborn)
Question/Item: Baby referred for any reason? (Yes/No) If yes write date reason and place of referral

Form: Annexure 1c - Home Visit Form (Mother and Newborn)
Question/Item: Mother referred for any reason? (Yes/No) If yes write date reason and place of referral

Form: Annexure 1c - Home Visit Form (Mother and Newborn)
Question/Item: All limbs limp (Yes/No)
Action/Notes: Consider first three signs as criteria for diagnosing sepsis only if sign was absent previously and newly developed. If any ONE feature of sepsis present on same day diagnose as sepsis start first dose of Amoxicillin as per weight and refer to SNCU immediately: <2.0kg - 2ml; 2.0-3.0kg - 2.5ml; 3.0-4.0kg - 3ml; 4.0-5.0kg - 4ml

Form: Annexure 1c - Home Visit Form (Mother and Newborn)
Question/Item: Feeding less/stopped (Yes/No)

Form: Annexure 1c - Home Visit Form (Mother and Newborn)
Question/Item: Cry weak/stopped (Yes/No)

Form: Annexure 1c - Home Visit Form (Mother and Newborn)
Question/Item: Distended abdomen or mother says baby vomits often (Yes/No)

Form: Annexure 1c - Home Visit Form (Mother and Newborn)
Question/Item: Mother says the baby is 'cold to touch' or baby has fever with temperature > 99°F (37.2°C)

Form: Annexure 1c - Home Visit Form (Mother and Newborn)
Question/Item: Chest in drawing (Yes/No)

Form: Annexure 1c - Home Visit Form (Mother and Newborn)
Question/Item: Respiratory rate more than 60 per minute (Yes/No)

Form: Annexure 1c - Home Visit Form (Mother and Newborn)
Question/Item: Pus on umbilicus (Yes/No)
